src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.general_idea: Introduce a service layer to decouple business logic from the controller.
src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.human_impl: Autowired ClienteService and delegate CRUD operations to it.

src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.general_idea: Use DTOs for API contracts instead of exposing entity models directly.
src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.human_impl: Import ClienteDTO and use it in request/response bodies.

src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.general_idea: Add endpoint to retrieve a specific client by ID.
Refactor list endpoint to return DTOs via service layer.
src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.human_impl: Replace manual Iterable conversion with service.findAll() returning List<ClienteDTO>.

src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.general_idea: Add endpoint to create a new client.
Add endpoint to update an existing client.
Add endpoint to delete a client by ID.
Simplify CORS configuration by removing hardcoded origins.
Enable UUID handling for client identifiers.
src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.human_impl: Import java.util.UUID and use it in @PathVariable.

src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.general_idea: Enable Optional handling for safe value retrieval.
Enable LocalDate handling for date fields.
Include Jakarta Persistence annotations for potential future use or consistency.
Enable proper HTTP response handling.
Enable standard REST mapping annotations.
Enable dependency injection via annotation.
Changed the primary key from Long (auto-increment) to UUID to support distributed or non-sequential identifiers.
Replaced legacy java.sql.Date with java.time.LocalDate for better date handling and JDK compatibility.
Explicitly defined the database table name using @Table annotation.
Prevented modification of the ID field after creation by setting Lombok setter access level to NONE.
Added database-level constraints to ensure nome and data_inicio_contrato are not null.
Replaced Lombok @AllArgsConstructor with a specific constructor to control initialization logic and exclude the ID.
src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.human_impl: public Cliente(String nome, LocalDate data_inicio_contrato, LocalDate data_fim_contrato) { ... }

src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.general_idea: Changed the repository's generic type parameter from Long to UUID to align with the entity's primary key type.
Added a custom JPQL query method to check for client existence by name, ignoring case.
src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.human_impl: @Query("SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(i) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END FROM Cliente i WHERE LOWER(i.nome) = LOWER(:nome)") boolean existsByNomeIgnoreCase(@Param("nome") String nome);

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.2.5 to 3.3.5 to support Java 21 and access newer features.
Add Spring Boot Starter Mail dependency to enable email sending capabilities.
Add Spring Boot Starter Security dependency to enable security features.
Add Flyway Core dependency for database migration management.
Add H2 database dependency for in-memory database support.
Explicitly set PostgreSQL driver version to 42.7.4.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for testing security configurations.
Add JJWT API dependency for JSON Web Token handling.
Add JJWT Implementation dependency for JSON Web Token handling.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization in JWT.
Add Java Servlet API dependency for servlet interfaces.
Add Auth0 Java JWT dependency for JWT utilities.
Update Lombok version from 1.18.32 to 1.18.34.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency for bean validation.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI dependency for API documentation.
Add ModelMapper dependency for object mapping.
Remove Spring Boot Starter Jersey dependency as it is no longer needed.
Remove Spring Boot DevTools dependency.
Remove Spring Security OAuth2 Autoconfigure dependency.
Add Flyway Maven Plugin to automate database migrations during build.
Correct spelling errors in the project description field.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Updated the database URL to point to a new database name 'db_control'.
Switched Hibernate DDL auto strategy from 'create-drop' to 'validate' for production safety.
Added Flyway configuration for database migration management.
Added JWT secret key configuration for authentication.
Added SMTP mail server configuration for sending emails.
Removed the old OAuth2 client scope configuration.
Removed explicit static resource path patterns, likely relying on defaults or new structure.
Updated SQL logging properties to use Hibernate specific format and show_sql flags.
